description: Comopsition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Do not dry clean Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach or scrub Tumble dry Warm iron; but do not iron on print A perfect piece for the urban rebel, this Levi's tee boldly proclaims "Blame your tools" in a graphic print on the front. Make your statement, literally, and add this piece to your ensemble, recreating a contemporary version of the angry young man. Team this tee with faded jeans and colourful sneakers shoes to pull off the rebel-without-a-cause look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
